## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention: `feature/<issue-id>-<slug>`
- [ ] PR links a GitHub issue
- [ ] Scope is focused to one feature/fix
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets committed
